3233140.name: Dewlight Horizon
3233140.description:
This game is still in development. Videos and images shown are not representative of final quality.

Dewlight Horizon is a slow-life farming sim and wholesome adventure RPG with a magitech twist, where you’ll explore the affinity between magic and technology. Awaken in a world familiar yet different. With the help of a warm and welcoming community, you set out to begin your new life, turn overgrown fields into a thriving homestead, explore a vast land, and discover an enchanting adventure teeming with lively characters and a captivating mystery waiting to be solved.

Every day brings new possibilities. Explore for hidden treasures, grow crops, harvest resources, and venture into the unknown by mastering your tools and spells. Befriend the elemental spirits, unlock technological secrets, and wield the combined powers of magic and technology to restore harmony to the land.

Master Your Profession

Dive into numerous professions, each with their own characteristics. Level up skills that match your playstyle naturally by doing what you love, whether it’s farming, fighting, exploring, mining, or fishing. Each profession offers its own style of life, possibilities, perks, and rewards.

Build Your Homestead

Build, expand, and customize your dream home and farm! Choose from a wide range of building parts and décor to create a space that reflects your style, whether you’re drawn to magic or advanced technology. Furniture and decorations do more than look good - they also provide valuable stat boosts.

Farming with a Twist

Plant and harvest 50+ crops, tend to animals, start an orchard, craft automation machines to boost your productivity, and unlock magic that will aid you in farming & adventuring. Adapt to the changing seasons. With plenty of space, you can create the farm of your dreams year-round!

Explore an Vibrant Seasonal World

Freely explore a vibrant open world with day-night cycle and changing seasons. Collect artifacts, seeds, and recipes. Each season introduces unique twists and rewards, keeping your adventure ever-changing and full of surprises. Uncover clues hidden throughout diverse landscapes and unravel mysteries.

Harness Elemental Magic and Technology

Harness and master elemental power to explore the world, battle foes, and uncover secrets! Blend magic and technology to care for your homestead. Ride the wind through open skies. Fuel crafting with fire. Cultivate the land with Earth power.

Join a Community

Befriend the locals, unravel the world’s mysteries, strengthen the community, and earn meaningful rewards.

Restore the Environment

Restore a world tainted by corruptions as you explore every corner of the land. Tend the soil with mindful farming and craft tools to cleanse the environment - planting seeds, purifying water, and rebuilding lost places.

Romance

Forge lasting bounds with charming characters, each with their own story to share. Find love among eligible marriage candidates and share a cozy life of farming and adventure with your special someone.

Everything Else

Dewlight Horizon offers something for everyone. How you spend your time is entirely up to you. Dive into your favorite profession, chase mastery, or take it slow and enjoy a peaceful afternoon of fishing. The choice is yours!

  • Customize your character.

  • Save freely outside of combat.

  • Toggle freely between first-person and third-person views.

And so much more!
